flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mercer County Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.7k → $5.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mercer County Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.3k → $9.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mercer County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5% → 0.0%).
